field.label: Interface
field.help: OPNsense interface to enable IS-IS on.

field.label: Circuit Type
field.help: IS-IS level participation for this interface. Overrides the global IS type for this circuit.

field.label: Network Type
field.help: Force interface network type. Use Point-to-Point on links where DIS election is undesired (e.g. p2p WAN links). Leave empty for auto-detection.

field.label: Passive
field.help: Suppress IS-IS hello packets on this interface. The interface prefix is still advertised into IS-IS.

field.label: Metric
field.help: Interface metric (cost). Wide range: 1–16777215. Leave empty to use the FRR default (10).

field.label: Hello Interval (s)
field.help: Interval in seconds between IS-IS hello PDUs. Default is 3 seconds for point-to-point, 10 for broadcast.

field.label: Hello Multiplier
field.help: Number of missed hellos before adjacency is declared down. Hold time = hello_interval × hello_multiplier. Default is 10.

field.label: Auth Mode
field.help: Interface-level authentication mode. Leave empty to inherit domain setting or disable.
